title: Account page — change email form
description: Wire up the Email Address section on the Account page so users can update their email.
acceptanceCriteria: Email section shows a text input pre-filled with the current user email
Saving calls PATCH /api/user/profile and updates the email in AuthContext
Invalid email format shows validation error
Email already used by another account shows error 'Email already in use'
Save button shows loading state during API call

steps.details: Similar to display name form. Zod schema: z.object({ email: z.string().email('Invalid email format') }). Pre-fill with user.email. Same loading and success pattern as TASK-28.
onSubmit: call updateProfile({ email }) from apiService. On success: call updateUser() with updated user. On 400 error: show 'Email already in use'. On success, show 'Email updated' confirmation.

Change email to a new valid email — verify success. Try changing to an invalid format — verify validation error. Try registering a second account and then changing first account's email to the second account's email — verify 'Email already in use' error.

technicalNotes: Reuse the same form pattern established in TASK-28 for consistency
